title: Aseprite Font
description: Uses Aseprite's font in Minecraft. Aseprite (Pixel Editor)
body:
This resourcepack adds the Aseprite Font to Minecraft!  
The only tested version so far is 1.20.6 .

Tho the **@** symbol had to be changed a bit, it was bigger than the maximum size. It's still different than Minecraft's **@** symbol tho. There are only the ASCII characters, but all the characters from the ASCII character set are from the exact Aseprite font.

DM me on [my Discord](https://discord.com/users/1182662563771727986) if you encounter a bug or if you would like me to add something.

For those who didn't already know, Aseprite is a paid for pixel editor.  
You can find the [Aseprite Font](https://github.com/aseprite/aseprite/blob/main/data/fonts/aseprite_font.png) directly on github.

## Enjoy!
or not..
